title: Honey, including millefiori of alpine flora, and jams
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is ITALY UNIMOL and UNIPI. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 53 IT. The farm has the following mountain products in production: honey from dandelion, acacia, lime and chestnut trees, wildflower and wildflower of alpine flora honey, which received the award Una goccia d oro for the category ' high mountain wildflower ; in addition to these, they produced propolis, royal jelly and jams from various fruits.
